description_long: This is a four-tier open shelving unit with a modern industrial design, featuring four rectangular wooden shelves supported by a sturdy black metal frame. The frame consists of two vertical side supports connected by horizontal bars at the top and bottom, providing stability and a geometric aesthetic. Each shelf is made of a warm, medium-toned wood with a visible grain pattern, contrasting with the matte black metal structure. The open sides and back allow for easy access and visibility of items placed on the shelves, making it suitable for displaying or storing objects. The overall construction appears robust, with the metal frame likely providing significant weight-bearing capacity. This type of shelving unit is commonly used in urban environments such as garages, workshops, retail spaces, or modern apartments for organization and display.
description: A four-tier open shelving unit with wooden shelves and a black metal frame, designed for robust storage and display. The industrial style and open structure make it suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four wooden shelves framed by the black metal supports, with open access to each shelf.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the vertical black metal frame, with the shelves extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the shelves and the parallel metal supports, emphasizing the open design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the shelf depth and the supporting metal frame.
